summary: Solid, professional code. PowerShell conventions properly applied (Set-StrictMode, error handling). Workflow uses pinned versions and least-privilege permissions. Minor issues: (1) env var fallback syntax in workflow ~line 48 is subtle—`${{ github.event.inputs.fixture || env.FIXTURE_FILE }}` works but clearer as `${{ inputs.fixture || 'simple.json' }}`; (2) job-success assertion in Run-ActHarness.ps1 ~line 95 brittle—counts 'Job succeeded' strings but doesn't validate output structure; (3) MatrixGenerator.psm1 ~line 209 uses magic number `Depth=8` without comment. Cartesian product and include/exclude logic correct. Would ship.
